LEICESTER
SPACE WEEK
LogoColoursTypographyVisual languageApplicationsDownloads
Brand portal

Applications

Built to travel.

The system is intentionally modular: enough consistency to be recognisable, enough flexibility to work for every contributor and context.

01

Digital

Use Navy-led compositions, high contrast type and a single amber action. Start with generous margins, then layer in one subtle orbit.

02

Social

Use the icon mark for avatars. Event posts lead with a concise title, date and category; preserve clear space around partner marks.

03

Physical space

On signage, banners and wayfinding, use large fields of Navy and short messages. The skyline can establish a location at scale.

Partner toolkit

Share the stage.

Partner logos are important, but the Leicester Space Week crest should retain clear recognition in event-owned communications.

Co-branding principle

LSW  +  Partner

Equal clear space

Separate marks with a thin vertical rule or a generous fixed gap. Align optical centres.

Event first

Where Leicester Space Week is the host, its mark appears first and is never smaller than the partner logo.

LEICESTER
SPACE WEEK

A shared visual language for an ambitious city of science, discovery and collaboration.

Brand guidelines · v1.0 · 2026
